description: Expected outcomes for learner personas (P08-P11). AI agents evaluate engagement arc, aha moments, and question diversity.

expectations.mapExpectation: Mixed yellow/green/red across all domains. No single dominant color. Map should show genuine variation — not uniformly medium.

learnerSpecific.expectedEngagementArc: curiosity → mixed success → insight → continued engagement

expectations.mapExpectation: Clear green in CS regions, red in biology regions. Visible split between strong and weak areas. Map should tell a story of uneven knowledge.

learnerSpecific.expectedEngagementArc: confidence in CS → struggle in bio → self-discovery about gaps

expectations.mapExpectation: Moderate yellow/green in neuroscience. Red elsewhere. After video watch, slight green improvement near video topic region.
Predominantly red/yellow across mathematics. Scattered correct answers show small green pockets. Map should still look coherent despite low accuracy.

learnerSpecific.expectedEngagementArc: tired start → gradual engagement or gradual disengagement
